debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

failed_attempts:
· rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      have bad_head : Exp.eval (Exp.v args.head * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v args.head)) ≠ 0 := by
         simp [sub_eq_zero]
         rcases h_head with ⟨n0, n1⟩
         intro z
         cases z
         · contradiction
         · apply n1; rw [←sub_eq_zero]; assumption
      simp [bad_head]
      let l := (args.extract 1).toArray.data
      have : (args.extract 1).toArray.data = l := rfl
      rw [this]
      induction l with
      | nil => simp
      | cons b bs ih_l =>
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        apply ih_l
    · rw [assert_bit_e]
      have : args.extract 1 = args.tail := by rfl
      rw [this]
      apply ih
      exact h_tail

· exact h_head.1 z
          · exact h_head.2 z.symm
        rw [if_neg this]
      · apply ih ht
    · -- Tail failure
      apply ih h_tail
l
split <;> rfl

induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro i hi
    contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro i hi h0 h1 cs
    rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail args]
    simp only [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, List.foldl_cons, Vector.toList_cons]
    by_cases h_idx : i = 0
    · subst h_idx
      simp only [Vector.get_zero] at h0 h1
      have h_fail : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        simp only [Exp.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro z
          rw [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
          cases z with
          | inl z => exact h0 z
          | inr z => exact h1 z.symm
        rw [if_neg this]
      clear h0 h1 hi
      generalize assert_bit_e cs args.head = cs' at h_fail
      let rec propagate {m} (v : Vector (ZMod p) m) (c : Cs p (ZMod p)) (hc : c.eval = .n) :
        (Vector.foldl assert_bit_e c v).eval = .n := by
        match m with
        | 0 =>
          simp [Vector.foldl]
          exact hc
        | m+1 =>
          rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail v]
          simp [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
          apply propagate
          rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
          simp [hc]
          split <;> rfl
      apply propagate _ _ h_fail
    · let i' := i - 1
      have hi' : i = i' + 1 := (Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_pos (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_idx)).symm
      rw [hi'] at h0 h1
      simp only [Vector.get_cons_succ] at h0 h1
      apply ih i' (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hi) h0 h1

· by_cases ht : assert_bits tail
      · rw [reduce₁ ht, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        simp only [Exp.eval, sub_eq_zero]
        have : head * (1 - head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro z
          cases (mul_eq_zero.mp z) with
          | inl z => apply h_head; left; exact z
          | inr z => apply h_head; right; apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero; exact z
        rw [if_neg this]
      · apply ih ht
    · apply ih h_tail

rw [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl]
  generalize hL : args.toList = L
  have h_len : i < L.length := by rw [←hL, Vector.length_toList]; exact h_lt
  have h_bad : L[i] * (1 - L[i]) ≠ 0 := by
    intro heq
    have : L[i] = 0 ∨ L[i] = 1 := by
      rwa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at heq
    have : L[i] = args[i] := by rw [←hL]; simp
    rw [this] at ‹L[i] = 0 ∨ L[i] = 1›
    cases ‹L[i] = 0 ∨ L[i] = 1› <;> contradiction
  clear h_lt h0 h1 hL
  induction L generalizing i cs with
  | nil => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i h_len).elim
  | cons x xs ih =>
    rw [List.foldl_cons]
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      have : x * (1 - x) ≠ 0 := h_bad
      let bad_cs := Cs.eq0 (Exp.v x * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v x)) cs
      have h_fail : bad_cs.eval = .n := by simp [Cs.eval, Exp.eval, this]
      clear this
      revert bad_cs h_fail
      induction xs with
      | nil => intro c hc; exact hc
      | cons y ys ih' =>
        intro c hc
        rw [List.foldl_cons]
        apply ih'
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        split_ifs <;> [exact hc; rfl]
    | j+1 =>
      apply ih j
      · simp at h_len; exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h_len
      · exact h_bad

· let c' := assert_bit_e cs args.head
      have : c'.eval = .n := by
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
        intro z
        cases (mul_eq_zero.mp z)
        · apply h_head; left; assumption
        · apply h_head; right; simp at *; assumption
      change (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1) c').eval = .n
      by_cases ht : assert_bits (args.extract 1)
      · rw [reduce₁ ht, this]
      · apply ih ht
    · change (assert_bits_e (args.extract 1) (assert_bit_e cs args.head)).eval = .n
      apply ih h_tail

rw [if_neg this]
    · apply ih ht

· right
      simp only [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro z
        simp only [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
        cases z <;> simp [*] at h_hd
      rw [if_neg this]
      rfl
    · left; exact h_tl
    · right
      simp only [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      split <;> [exact h_eval, rfl]

· by_cases h_tail_valid : assert_bits (args.extract 1)
      · rw [reduce₁ h_tail_valid]
        unfold cs' assert_bit_e Cs.eval
        unfold Exp.eval Exp.eval Exp.eval
        simp only [sub_eq_zero, mul_eq_zero]
        intro h_or
        apply h_head
        cases h_or with
        | inl h0 => left; exact h0
        | inr h1 => right; exact eq_of_sub_eq_zero h1.symm
      · apply ih h_tail_valid
    · apply ih h_tail

intro n v c hc
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      have : v = Vector.nil := by simp
      rw [this]; simp [Vector.foldl, hc]
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [←Vector.cons_head_tail v]
      simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
      apply ih
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hc]
  revert i args cs
  induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro args cs i h
    contradiction
  | succ w ih =>
    intro args cs i h_lt h0 h1
    rw [assert_bits_e, ←Vector.cons_head_tail args]
    simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      apply propagate
      simp only [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, Exp.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro z
        rw [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
        have h0' : args.head ≠ 0 := by simpa using h0
        have h1' : args.head ≠ 1 := by simpa using h1
        cases z <;> contradiction
      rw [if_neg this]
    | i+1 =>
      rw [←assert_bits_e]
      apply ih
      · apply Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h_lt
      · simp at h0; exact h0
      · simp at h1; exact h1

· rcases h_bits with h_head | h_tail
      · right
        unfold assert_bit_e
        simp only [Cs.eval]
        rw [if_neg]
        · rfl
        · intro heq
          simp only [Exp.eval] at heq
          have : args.head * (1 - args.head) = 0 := heq
          rw [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at this
          rcases this with h0 | h1
          · simp [h0] at h_head
          · simp [h1] at h_head
      · left
        exact h_tail
    · right
      unfold assert_bit_e
      simp only [Cs.eval]
      rw [h_eval]
      split <;> rfl

· apply ih
      exact h_tail

· by_cases h_t : assert_bits args.tail
      · rw [reduce₁ h_t]
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        intro hz
        apply h_head
        rcases eq_zero_or_eq_zero_of_mul_eq_zero hz with h0 | h1
        · left; exact h0
        · right; apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero h1
      · apply ih h_t
    · apply ih h_tail

· exact h.1 z
        · exact h.2 z.symm
      rw [if_neg this]
    · apply ih
      exact ht
rfl

unfold Vector.foldl
  let L := args.toArray.toList
  have : (List.foldl assert_bit_e cs L).eval = .n := by
    have lem : ∀ (bs : List (ZMod p)) (c : Cs p (ZMod p)),
        (List.foldl assert_bit_e c bs).eval = if bs.all (fun x => x = 0 ∨ x = 1) then c.eval else .n := by
      intro bs
      induction bs with
      | nil => intro c; simp
      | cons b bs ih =>
        intro c
        simp [ih, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have : (Exp.v b * (Exp.c 1 - Exp.v b)).eval = 0 ↔ (b = 0 ∨ b = 1) := by
          simp [Exp.eval, mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero, eq_comm]
        rw [this]
        split_ifs <;> simp
    rw [lem]
    have : ¬ L.all (fun x => x = 0 ∨ x = 1) := by
      rw [List.all_eq_true, not_forall]
      use args[i]
      constructor
      · have : i < L.length := by simp [L, Vector.size_toArray, h]
        have : L.get ⟨i, this⟩ = args[i] := by simp [L]
        rw [←this]; apply List.get_mem
      · simp [h', h'']
    simp [this]
  simp only [List.foldl_toArray', this]

· by_cases ht : assert_bits args.tail
      · rw [reduce₁ ht, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        simp only [Exp.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro z
          simp only [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
          cases z <;> contradiction
        rw [if_neg this]
      · apply ih ht
    · apply ih h_tail

apply prop
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      intro z
      simp [sub_eq_zero] at z
      rcases z with z | z
      · apply h_head; left; exact z
      · apply h_head; right; exact z.symm

apply prop
      unfold assert_bit_e
      simp only [Cs.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro z
        have : args.head = 0 ∨ args.head = 1 := by simpa [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] using z
        cases this <;> contradiction
      rw [if_neg]
      · rfl
      · simp [Exp.eval]; exact this
    · apply ih
      exact h_tail

· exact h_head.1 ‹_›
      · exact h_head.2 ‹_›.symm

apply propagate args.tail bad_cs h_bad
    · simp only [assert_bits_e, Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons] at ih
      apply ih
      unfold assert_bits
      exact h_tail

· exact h_head.1 z
          · exact h_head.2 z.symm
        rw [if_neg this]
      · apply ih h_tail_ok
    · apply ih h_tail

intros w args cs h
  rw [claim]
  simp [h]

· exact h_head.1 z
          · apply h_head.2; rw [sub_eq_zero] at z; exact z.symm
        rw [if_neg this]
      | inr h_tail => contradiction
    · apply ih ht

· apply eval_fail
      rw [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
         intro z; simp [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
         cases z <;> absurd h_head <;> simp_all
      unfold Exp.eval Exp.eval Exp.eval Exp.eval
      simp [this]
    · apply ih
      exact h_tail

· by_cases ht : assert_bits args.tail
      · rw [reduce₁ ht]
        simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
        have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro z
          simp [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
          rcases z with z | z
          · simp [z] at h_head
          · simp [z] at h_head
        rw [if_neg this]
      · apply ih ht
    · apply ih h_tail

induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro args cs i hi
    cases hi
  | succ w ih =>
    intro args cs i hi h0 h1
    have h_split : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
      ext k hk
      match k with
      | .zero => simp; rfl
      | .succ k => simp [add_comm]
    
    rw [h_split]
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_cast, Vector.toArray_append, Vector.toArray_extract, Array.size_append,
      List.size_toArray, List.length_cons, List.length_nil, zero_add, Array.size_extract,
      Vector.size_toArray, min_self, add_tsub_cancel_right,
      Array.foldl_append', List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons, List.foldl_nil]
    
    match i with
    | 0 =>
      have : args.head ≠ 0 ∧ args.head ≠ 1 := by
         simp at h0 h1
         have : args.head = args.get 0 := by simp
         rw [this]
         exact ⟨h0, h1⟩
      have h_inner : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
         unfold assert_bit_e
         simp [Cs.eval]
         have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
            intro z
            simp [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero] at z
            rcases z with z|z
            exact this.1 z
            exact this.2 z.symm
         rw [if_neg]
         · rfl
         · simp [Exp.eval]; exact this
      generalize hl : (args.tail).toArray.data = l
      generalize hc : (assert_bit_e cs args.head) = c
      rw [h_inner] at hc
      rw [hc]
      clear ih h0 h1 this hl cs args
      induction l generalizing c with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons b l ih =>
         unfold List.foldl
         apply ih
         unfold assert_bit_e
         simp [Cs.eval]
         split <;> rfl
    | i+1 =>
      have h_tail_bad : ¬ args.tail[i] = 0 ∧ ¬ args.tail[i] = 1 := by
         simp at h0 h1
         have : args.get ⟨i+1, hi⟩ = args.tail.get ⟨i, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp hi⟩ := by simp
         rw [this] at h0 h1
         exact ⟨h0, h1⟩
      apply ih (i := i)
      · exact Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp hi
      · exact h_tail_bad.1
      · exact h_tail_bad.2

· have prop : ∀ {w : ℕ} (v : Vector (ZMod p) w) (c : Cs p (ZMod p)),
          c.eval = .n → (assert_bits_e v c).eval = .n := by
        intros w v c hc
        unfold assert_bits_e
        induction w with
        | zero =>
          have : v = #v[] := by simp
          rw [this]; exact hc
        | succ w ih' =>
          have : v = Vector.cons v.head v.tail := by ext i; cases i using Fin.cases <;> simp
          rw [this, fold_cons]; apply ih'; unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval; simp [hc]
      apply prop
      unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval
      have : args.head * (1 - args.head) ≠ 0 := by
        intro z; simp [sub_eq_zero] at z; cases z <;> { apply h_head; simp [*] }
      simp [Exp.eval, this]
    · apply ih h_tail

induction w with
  | zero =>
    intro args cs i h
    cases h
  | succ w ih =>
    intro args cs i h_i h_nz h_n1
    let head := args.head
    let tail := args.tail
    have h_cons : args = Vector.cons head tail := (Vector.cons_head_tail _).symm
    rw [h_cons]
    rw [h_cons] at h_nz h_n1
    unfold assert_bits_e
    simp only [Vector.foldl, Vector.toList_cons, List.foldl_cons]
    cases i with
    | zero =>
      simp at h_nz h_n1
      by_cases ht : assert_bits tail
      · rw [reduce₁ ht]
        simp [Cs.eval]
        unfold Exp.eval
        have : head * (1 - head) ≠ 0 := by
          intro z
          cases (mul_eq_zero.mp z) with
          | inl z => apply h_nz; simp [z]
          | inr z => apply h_n1; simp at z; exact eq_of_sub_eq_zero z
        simp [this]
        rfl
      · unfold assert_bits at ht
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.decide_or, Vector.all_eq_true, Bool.or_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq,
          not_forall, not_or] at ht
        rcases ht with ⟨j, hj_lt, hj_nz, hj_n1⟩
        apply ih tail (assert_bit_e cs head) j hj_lt hj_nz hj_n1
    | succ i =>
      simp at h_nz h_n1
      apply ih tail (assert_bit_e cs head) i (Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ h_i) h_nz h_n1

· have h_bad : args.head ≠ 0 ∧ args.head ≠ 1 := by
        rw [not_or] at h_head
        exact h_head
      have step_n : (assert_bit_e cs args.head).eval = .n := by
        unfold assert_bit_e Cs.eval Exp.eval
        simp only [mul_eq_zero, sub_eq_zero]
        rw [if_neg]
        rintro (h0 | h1)
        · exact h_bad.1 h0
        · exact h_bad.2 h1.symm
      by_cases ht : assert_bits args.tail
      · rw [reduce₁ ht]
        exact step_n
      · exact ih ht
    · exact ih h_tail
